params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, ForecastQuantity FROM ForecastingItem WHERE ForecastingTypeId = '0DbW7000001ZgGjKAK' AND PeriodId = '0261v000000CUOOAA4' AND ForecastingItemCategory = 'MostLikelyForecast' AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE','005W7000006FAIDIA4','005W7000004kT37IAE','005W700000AXqN3IAL') LIMIT 50
